runtime_policy: local original-executable byte inspection only; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows
guard_policy: the natural right-bottom action route must retain the command-99 owner-loop callback, owner-global writes, 004338E0 owner flag bit-2 early-return gate, and 00433C20 owner-loop bit gates before the current owner-flag blocker can be treated as understood evidence

patterns.name: owner_global_532150_write
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 stores the owner pointer in dword_532150

patterns.name: owner_global_53214c_write
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 stores the selected owner index/state in dword_53214C

patterns.name: owner_global_532154_write
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 stores the owner UI surface pointer in dword_532154

patterns.name: action_4338e0_bit2_early_return
patterns.rationale: 004338E0 immediately returns unless owner flag bit 0x02 is set

patterns.name: action_433914_stock_owner_call
patterns.rationale: the validation wrapper targets only the post-gate owner/action draw call

patterns.name: owner_loop_bit2_gate
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 checks owner flag bit 0x02 before the action descriptor lane

patterns.name: owner_loop_bit1_gate
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 checks owner flag bit 0x01 before an adjacent owner descriptor lane

patterns.name: owner_loop_bit8_gate
patterns.rationale: 00433C20 checks owner flag bit 0x08 before an adjacent owner descriptor lane
